items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous "page" (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
items.title: gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous "page" (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.

items.content_html: 🚀 Obsidian Global Proxy is an Obsidian plugin that makes it easy to configure web proxies and use proxies throughout Obsidian.
items.title: windingblack/obsidian-global-proxy: 🚀 Obsidian Global Proxy is an Obsidian plugin that makes it easy to configure web proxies and use proxies throughout Obsidian.

items.content_html: A collection of Obsidian snippets that can be utilized with plugins such as Dataview and the Obsidian Folder Notes plugin which include things like a table of contents, and a way to track bad / broken links.
items.title: Aetherinox/obsidian-dataview-snippets: A collection of Obsidian snippets that can be utilized with plugins such as Dataview and the Obsidian Folder Notes plugin which include things like a table of contents, and a way to track bad / broken links.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin to create and access daily notes for any date. Choose a date via command palette (yesterday, tomorrow, next/prev week/month) or a calendar popup. Plan, review, or reflect on your life and work
items.title: luiisca/obsidian-daily-note-flex-plugin: An Obsidian plugin to create and access daily notes for any date. Choose a date via command palette (yesterday, tomorrow, next/prev week/month) or a calendar popup. Plan, review, or reflect on your life and work

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian that searches your vault for tasks that contain dates, and generates a calendar in iCal format that can be imported into your preferred calendar application.
